ai_summary: Here's an executive summary of the provided financial document:  Promoter Chemikas Speciality LLP reported a net decrease in its pledged shares of Archean Chemical Industries Limited. While 850,000 shares (0.69% of company capital) were newly pledged as collateral for loans, a larger block of 2,200,000 shares (1.78%) was simultaneously released due to loan repayment. This net reduction in encumbered shares is a positive indicator of improved financial leverage for the promoter, presenting no immediate red flags.
